data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'real-time itinerary updates', but the evidence provided does not include any API endpoints or functionality that confirms this capability. The prior step evidence does not mention any real-time updates or mechanisms for itinerary adjustments, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the fulfillment of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an API or functionality for real-time itinerary updates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
